Welcome
Hi Mike,
✅ Registration Confirmed!
Thank you for registering Testing for Shooting Challenge | 2025-2026.
This program is designed to help athletes build shooting habits through consistent repetition and daily accountability.
We are excited to have your family involved, and we appreciate your support in helping your athlete stay engaged throughout the program.

What’s Next?

mschmidt@fairfield.k12.mt.us
Please review and save the links below so they are easy to access throughout the program.

Program Website Daily Submission Link Registration Link
Registration Closes: May 31, 2026
Why This Matters
The FBC Shooting Challenge is a 60-day individual skill development and competition program that pushes athletes to complete a set goal amount of quality basketball shots over two months. Open to students in grades 1–12 the challenge emphasizes consistency, technique, and personal accountability. Athletes receive an online submission app to log their attempted shots from structured workouts or driveway sessions. Coach Schmidt will provide optional drills, form tips, and weekly motivation to support progress. The challenge is open to all players regardless of team placement and can be completed independently or as a member of a team. Athletes who complete the full challenge receive recognition for "Conquering the Challenge." Prizes and additional honors will be awarded for effort, accuracy, and leadership.
Thank You
Thank you for being part of Shooting Challenge | 2025-2026.
If you have questions, reply to this email and we will be glad to help.
Mike Schmidt
Founder – 127 Sports Intensity
